Ziggurat-Like Structures Worldwide

Made by Grok.
Region/Continent Location/Site Structure Name(s) Brief Description GPS Coordinates Image

This is a single-page web app displaying the table with embedded images and GPS coordinates. Click any image to expand it in a modal for zooming. Scroll down for an interactive world map with labeled markers.
